pi_items.source: Web search confirmed US88160R1014 is Tesla Inc's official ISIN; setup_task.sh line 25 embeds this ISIN; Vienna Stock Exchange and Fidelity confirm this is the correct ISIN for Tesla Inc (TSLA)
setup_task.sh line 22 creates security with name 'Tesla Inc'; confirmed via web search as official company name
Web search confirms Tesla Cybercab was revealed at the 'We, Robot' event on October 10, 2024; setup_task.sh line 32 includes price data for this date; task description specifies this date

Web search confirms the event was the 'We, Robot' event featuring the Cybercab robotaxi; keywords are accurate to the real event that occurred on 2024-10-10; task description specifies 'Cybercab Reveal Event'
setup_task.sh line 14 and export_result.sh line 9 both use this directory; clean_portfolio_data function in task_utils.sh references this directory as standard data location

privileged_info_summary: This task audits a Portfolio Performance application task where an agent must log a corporate event (the Tesla Cybercab reveal) for the TSLA security (ISIN: US88160R1014). The event date is verified to be 2024-10-10, matching the real Tesla Cybercab reveal event at the 'We, Robot' event. The ISIN US88160R1014 is verified as Tesla Inc's official ISIN across multiple financial exchanges (Vienna Stock Exchange, Fidelity, Nasdaq). The portfolio file contains synthetic price data for Tesla stock with historical prices from September-October 2024 embedded in the XML setup. All metadata claims in the task definition are accurate to the real-world event they reference.
